validation_gates: CSV parses and task IDs unique
checksums match files and links pass
source blob and unsafe gates covered
macro fixture passes with gaps where needed
proc macro fixture emits static rows/gaps
build script fixture emits static rows/gaps
approved fixture captures logs or gaps
runtime tool metadata and `codedb --version` smoke pass
doctor reports protocol/runtime status and mismatch degrades explicitly
transient plugin command returns table-shaped output
registry test passes in isolated HOME and leaves real HOME unchanged
generated initializer has provenance/checksum and does not edit tracked config.nu
Yazelix launch with CodeDB bridge passes without heavy startup import
secret-looking fixtures are not leaked by default
lock contention/GC behavior documented and safe
bounded CLI/MCP output passes limits and exposes no raw source by default
EXTRACTION_PROOF.json parses and source ZIP SHA matches
DAG validates, dependencies resolve, all tasks have evidence paths
apply gate refusal and approval tests
compiler-observed expansion resolution hygiene and deterministic artifact proof
default refusal and approved proc-macro token/provenance proof
default refusal and approved build-script environment instruction log proof
checksum-bound OUT_DIR capture and exact reproduction proof
checksum-bound symlink capture storage replay rollback and safe fallback proof
approved native and linker fact provenance proof
MCP raw-source denial and bounded no-leak proof
repeat scan identity and truthful instability proof
HIR MIR semantic and rustdoc public-API drift proof
redb and live PostgreSQL migration rollback parity proof
failed apply rollback quarantine and recovery proof
complete operator decision provenance gate proof
nix flake check and full bidirectional validation

safety_constraints: no arbitrary language-to-Rust translation claims
no vendored external code
no package-manager or project-script execution by default
no source-truth promotion without round-trip proof
no byte/metadata normalization away
no package-manager dependency installation
no project script execution
no hidden repo-boundary expansion
no raw credential dumps
no raw source over MCP by default
no overwrite/materialization from this layer
no mandatory external CLI for default tests
no unsupported semantic claims
no pip or uv install in default path
no code execution for static capture
no bundle install or app boot by default
no package-manager install or project build by default
no overclaim of lossless language-to-Rust translation
no shell script execution
no Nix build/eval as default capture
no source overwrite by default
no credential embedding
no raw-source-over-MCP escape hatch
no hidden mutation shortcuts
no weak or indirect evidence accepted as completion proof
no unbounded dump commands and no default mutation verbs
this task itself must not trigger unsafe execution
missing evidence remains QUESTION or GAP or BLOCKER
do not silently supersede V1.1
do not present research deliverables as completed implementation
validation_gates: cargo gates only if code changes
